_comment: Cloud target properties following Famiano (2002) Table 3.
Three models are defined; uncomment the one you want to run.
Model B is the recommended starting point for reproduction:
BLR cloud, n = 1e11 cm^-3, T = 1e4 K.
No thermonuclear reactions (T too low), pure non-thermal cascade.
Model A is the dense central knot: n = 1e18 cm^-3, T = 6e8 K.
Thermonuclear reactions become important at later times.
Composition is 'primordial': X_H ~ 0.75, X_He ~ 0.25 by mass.
Y_i are number-per-baryon abundances: Y_H = 0.75, Y_He = 0.25/4 = 0.0625.
All other species start at zero (or seeded in the 'S' composition models).

model_B._description: BLR cloud — Famiano (2002) Table 3, Model B

model_A._description: Dense central knot — Famiano (2002) Table 3, Model A

metadata.description: BLR cloud, primordial composition — Famiano (2002) Table 3 Model B
